system_prompt: You are an expert at extracting professional roles from engineering-ethics cases using the ProEthica nine-component formalism and the professional-ethics literature (Oakley & Cocking 2001; Kong 2020; Doernberg & Truog 2023). Follow the extraction methodology, matching rules, and output format given in the user message exactly, and return only the requested JSON (no prose, markdown, or code fences).

role_category.description: Kong framework: provider_client, professional_peer, employer_relationship, public_responsibility, participant, stakeholder

matched_uri.description: URI of matched class (null if new)

matched_label.description: Label of matched class (null if new)

associated_virtues.description: Virtues characteristic of the role type (professional roles)

professional_scope.description: Areas of responsibility and authority (professional roles)

adheres_to_principles.description: Principles this role serves (adheresToPrinciple); professional roles

generated_obligations.description: Obligations the role generates (hasObligation; professional roles)

typical_qualifications.description: Generic credentials the role type requires (professional roles)

distinguishing_features.description: What sets this role type apart from related roles

new_role_classes.description: Role classes extracted from case text (CandidateRoleClass)

actor.description: Stable underlying actor this facet belongs to (e.g. 'Engineer A'); reused across sections so one Agent bears all facets of the actor

identifier.description: Unique instance descriptor (e.g. 'Engineer A Design Role')

role_class.description: Label of the role class this individual instantiates

relationships.description: Controlled role-to-role relationships; each {type, target, quote} where type is a value from the derived ROLE RELATIONSHIPS list

additional_relationships.description: Overflow bag: relationships that fit no controlled type; each {type, target, quote}. Staged for periodic review, not mapped to a controlled edge

case_involvement.description: How this individual is involved in the case

role_individuals.description: Specific persons/entities filling roles in the case (RoleIndividual)

existing_roles_text.description: Formatted list of existing role classes from ontology

role_schema.description: Role definitional/bearer field schema, resolved live from the SHACL role shapes (single source shared with the OntServe Role page)

role_definition.description: Governing definitional anchor: the Ch2-operationalised Role definition, read verbatim from the ontology

role_directives.description: Prescriptive extraction directives compiled from the disjointness/restriction/scopeNote axioms (D-EXCLUDE/D-AGENT/D-TELEO/D-INDIVIDUATION/D-FILTER/D-LABEL)

role_category_vocab.description: Controlled role_category vocabulary with per-category audience cues and the directed edge each implies

pass_directive.description: Per-pass directive; one body serves facts+discussion, differing only by this runtime slot

role_relationships.source: OntServe canonical relatedTo family (non-deprecated subproperties of proeth-core:relatedTo) via _role_relationships_block()
role_relationships.description: Controlled role-to-role relationship type vocabulary for the relationships[] field, derived from the ontology (hasClient/professionalPeerOf/employedBy/reviewsWorkOf/workReviewedBy + relatedTo fallback); includes the additional_relationships overflow-bag instruction

facts.name: Roles (facts)
facts.description: Extract new role classes and role individuals from case text using Kong et al. (2020) framework

discussion.name: Roles (discussion)
discussion.description: Extract new role classes and role individuals from case text using Kong et al. (2020) framework
